name: Descent into Darkness
description: A 10-level dungeon crawl into the depths of an ancient underground stronghold.

levels.name: The Village
levels.description: A quiet village at the edge of the wilderness. A staircase leads down into darkness.

levels.name: The Entrance
levels.description: Wide stone corridors echo with distant sounds.

levels.name: The Warrens
levels.description: A tangled maze of narrow tunnels and cramped chambers.

levels.name: Flooded Crypts
levels.description: Ankle-deep water covers the floor. The air smells of decay.

levels.name: The Forge
levels.description: Ancient dwarven forges still glow with faint embers.

levels.name: Fungal Caverns
levels.description: Bioluminescent fungi cast an eerie blue glow across vast caverns.

levels.name: The Labyrinth
levels.description: An intentionally confusing maze built to trap intruders.

levels.name: Obsidian Depths
levels.description: Walls of black volcanic glass reflect distorted images.

levels.name: The Abyssal Halls
levels.description: The darkness here feels alive. Ancient runes pulse on the walls.

levels.name: The Dragon's Lair
levels.description: The final depth. Gold glitters in the darkness. Something stirs.
